LABEL: 
1937 Alternative Benefit Plan State Plan Option Indicator — January–December (01–12) 
DESCRIPTION: A monthly flag to indicate whether the beneficiary received coverage through the 1937 Alternative Benefit 
Plan (ABP) state plan option (SPO). There are
